title: Credit Cards
description: Name paper "<Color> Credit Card" to make a credit card!
body:
# Credit Cards

Name paper "<Color> Credit Card" (capitalization needed!) to make a credit card!

There are 7 colors! (Red, Orange, Blue, Purple, Black, White, and the default! [Credit Card])

(Sorry the images in gallery are blurry)

## Dependencies
### **CIT Resewn**
